app.title: Relationship Values Check-In
app.description1: Identify the values that matter most in your relationship and explore how well your daily actions align with them.
app.description2: Strengthen your bond by acting on shared beliefs.
app.chooseTitle: Choose Values That Feel Important in Your Relationship
app.chooseDesc: Select the values that you want to prioritize as a couple. There is no right or wrong choice.
app.reflectDesc: Choose one of the selected values and think about how it shows up in your relationship.
app.reflectQuestion: How does this value strengthen or appear in your partnership?
app.reflectPlaceholder: We try to practice honesty and emotional openness when sharing our daily highlights and vulnerabilities.
app.liveDesc: Small, shared intentions bring values into the daily rhythm of a partnership.
app.liveQuestion: What is one small, concrete action you can take this week to cultivate this value together?
app.livePlaceholder: Plan a weekly evening check-in where we dedicate 15 minutes of uninterrupted conversation.
app.quote: "Love does not consist in gazing at each other, but in looking outward together in the same direction."
app.historyDesc: Your previous reflections are saved here so you can revisit them anytime.
app.noHistory: You haven't completed a values reflection yet.

common.completion_message: You've successfully completed this activity. Take a moment to appreciate your progress.
common.share_text: I have done this {{activityName}} in TherapyMantra and really enjoy it you can do it too just follow the link to android app {{androidUrl}} or ios app {{iosUrl}}
common.instruction_ready: Set your rounds and tap play to begin
common.instruction_running: Follow the circle to regulate your breath
